rationale: Section 72.010 governs boundary disputes and tax allocation between overlapping taxing units. It does not reference or depend on the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict arises from increasing the exemption.
quote: Sec. 72.010. SUIT TO ESTABLISH BOUNDARIES OF AND TAXES OWED TO CERTAIN COUNTIES OR TAXING UNITS LOCATED IN THOSE COUNTIES.
_note: Rule concerns jurisdictional boundary disputes, not homestead exemption amounts. No interaction with proposed change.
